entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Indigenous browse species used as a control due to its known good digestibility in small ruminants

entities.name: ANNONA SENEGALENSIS
entities.description: One of the six selected indigenous browse species evaluated for digestibility

entities.name: FICUS GNAPHALOCARPA
entities.description: One of the six selected indigenous browse species, found to be the overall best fodder species in terms of nutrient uptake

entities.name: PERICOPSIS LAXIFLORA
entities.description: One of the six selected indigenous browse species, found to be unsuitable as fodder

entities.name: PTEROCARPUS ERINACEUS
entities.description: One of the six selected indigenous browse species evaluated for digestibility

entities.name: AFZELIA AFRICANA
entities.description: One of the six selected indigenous browse species evaluated for digestibility

entities.name: WEST AFRICAN DWARF GOATS
entities.description: Young castrated billy goats used as the animal model for the digestibility trial

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The region where the trial was conducted, specifically Lawra and Jirapa Districts

entities.name: IN VIVO DIGESTIBILITY TRIAL
entities.description: The experimental procedure used to evaluate the digestibility of six forages

entities.name: COMPLETELY RANDOMIZED DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to assign animals to treatments

entities.name: DRY MATTER CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of the feed that remains after water is removed

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The total protein content of the feedstuffs

entities.name: NEUTRAL DETERGENT FIBRE
entities.description: A measure of the cell wall components of the feed

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT FIBRE
entities.description: A measure of the cellulose and lignin in the feed

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS CONTENT
entities.description: The level of phosphorus present in the fodder species

entities.name: APPARENT DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The proportion of feed that is absorbed by the animal

entities.name: NITROGEN RETENTION
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen retained by the animal after consumption

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The death rate of animals in the trial

entities.name: FEED INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of fodder consumed by the goats

entities.name: FODDER SPECIES
entities.description: The group of six selected plants evaluated for their suitability as animal feed

entities.name: NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The process of absorbing nutrients from the feed
